instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards such as SysML [17] for model-based systems engineering, ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25], [26] for architecture description languages (ADLs) to define component interfaces and interconnections. Methodologies including RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are applied across abstraction levels (requirements, functional, logical, product/technical). Behavior modeling integrates Simulink [28], simulation tools [29], [30], and general-purpose languages (C++, Java), with interoperability ensured through heterogeneous stakeholder integration [31]."
]
